title: Dependencies - option to auto pick item above
excerpt:

posts.author: MaggieB (Maggie Boler)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d like to request a feature in dependencies that shows an option for the item above the one you are creating the dependency for FIRST, then the full list of items on the board afterwards.

The problem I’m trying to solve is that I often have to scroll a lot to find the item I’m looking to set a dependency for, but in most cases it is actually the item that precedes it in the list.

I could see something like an up icon near the plus sign that indicates “select the item above”

posts.author: KLS13 (Kirsty)
posts.cookedHtml: Another one for this feature request. It can be quite cumbersome to go through and manually add the dependency as each line item above
